–Son of JacobGe 29:32;1Ch 2:1

–Adroitly seeks to save Joseph from the conspiracy of his brothersGe 37:21-30;42:22
–Jacob’ s prophetic benediction uponGe 49:3,4
–His childrenGe 46:9;Ex 6:14;1Ch 5:3-6;Nu 16:1
